amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 4,085 in Computers & Accessories (See Top 100 in Computers & Accessories) 600 in USB Cables

features: USB A Male to B Male cable connects PC to a printer, scanner, printer switch hub, KVM Switch, and more with a square USB B port.
Supports USB 2.0 data transfer rates up to 480 Mbps and is backward compatible with 1.1/ 1.0 devices, for printing, scanning, file transfers, and device data syncing.
Flexible, long, durable cable comes economically to save you a bundle.
Features foil & braid shielding, gold plated contacts and copper twisted-pair construction providing excellent performance,you can clearly see the internal structure.
Used with printers with standard USB type B interface such as HP series e.g. Deskjet/ Officejet, Canon, Pixma, Lexmark,Dell, Brother, etc.
description: After redecorating the office, you found that you could no longer reach the printer with your new computer stand. Or you just need a replacement when the printing job is getting worse using your original USB cable.USB 2.0 printer scanner cable works perfectly for your printer and laptop/ desktop. Well-Constructed and Hi-Speed: Not only does this bus-powered extended length USB 2.0 cable make it possible for you to use your printer reliably, but also it is well constructed with foil & braid shielding reduces EMI/RFI interference and twisted-pair construction reduces crosstalk thus ensuring high speed up to 480 Mbps error-free data transfer. Gold-plated copper contacts provide maximum conductivity and minimize data loss. A Perfect Accessory for your devices Ideal for connecting your keyboard, mouse, scanner, hard drive, KVM PC Sharing Switch, printer, server, camera and more, to a laptop, computer (Mac/PC) or other USB-enabled device. Specific: Connector 1: USB 2.0 Type A - Male Connector 2: USB 2.0 Type B – Male Full USB 2.0 capability, backward compatible with 1.1/ 1.0 Max. Transfer Rate: 480 Mbps Shield: foil & braided shielding Material: 100% Bare Copper Conductors; Good-plated Contacts; PVC Jacket; Copper Braid and Aluminum- Mylar Foil Color: Black Packing Included: 1 x USB 2.0 AM to BM Cable
